title: SimuPack
description: You can use SimuPacks to create, import and uninstall buildingpacks for New:simucraft mod
body:
# English Version
SimuPack is an add-on for [New:Sim-U-Kraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/new-sim-u-kraft) that lets you manage and create building packs directly inside Minecraft.

Pack Manager – install/uninstall .simupack packs via a simple GUI or commands.

Drag‑and‑Drop – drop pack files onto the GUI to import them.

Workspace – press P to open your personal workspace, where you can create your own packs:

Select buildings in-game (left/right click, enter to save)

Automatically detect mod dependencies

Fill in details (name, price, description)

Export finished packs as .simupack files with one click

Fully client‑side, multiplayer‑friendly, and available in English and Chinese.

# 中文
模拟大都市：筑艺坊（simupack） 是 [新：模拟大都市](https://modrinth.com/mod/new-sim-u-kraft) 的附属模组，让你在游戏内直接管理和创建建筑包。

包管理器 – 通过图形界面或指令安装/卸载 .simupack 包。

拖拽导入 – 将包文件拖入界面即可自动导入。

工作空间 – 按下 P 键 打开个人工作区，自由创作：

在游戏中圈选建筑（左/右键选点，回车保存）

自动检测所用模组依赖

填写名称、价格、介绍等信息

一键导出为 .simupack 文件

纯客户端功能，支持多人游戏，中英文双语界面。

# Video Tutorials/视频教程（Only Chinese Version）
[https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1Hnwez9ESu/](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV13eDxBXEDb)
